headline: Pixel Watch 5 leak shows off four different finishes
summary: Pixel Watch 5 details leaked ahead of Google's launch event. Renders reveal four distinct case finishes. Expect black, silver, gold, and a duskier tone.

headline: EverQuest’s biggest fans are leading its revival
summary: EverQuest, a classic live-service game, is making a comeback after 25 years. Fans are driving the revival with EverQuest Legends. The game is currently in preorder beta.

headline: Google’s Demis Hassabis says it’s time for a global AI watchdog — led by the US
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis calls for a global AI watchdog. He believes the US should lead this initiative. The watchdog would halt dangerous frontier AI models.

headline: The first sunlight reflecting space mirror has been cleared for launch
summary: Reflect Orbital's space mirror cleared for launch by FCC. The mirror aims to redirect sunlight to Earth at night. A prototype satellite will enter low-Earth orbit this year.

headline: 'Now, It's All About What the Fans Think' — Star Wars Creator George Lucas Says Hollywood Takes the Wrong Message From Focus Groups and 'Let the Audience Actually Make the Movie'
summary: George Lucas criticizes Hollywood's reliance on focus groups. He believes audiences don't truly know what they want. Lucas suggests focus groups let audiences 'actually make the movie'.

headline: Nintendo Reportedly Considering Switch 2 OLED Model — Though Remains Concerned Over How Much It Would Cost
summary: Nintendo is reportedly exploring a Switch 2 OLED model. The company has concerns about potential manufacturing costs. No firm plans or release dates have been confirmed.

headline: 'They're Bringing the Heat': Marvel Fans Hyped for X-Men Reboot Casting as Adam Driver Rumors Swirl
summary: Marvel fans are excited about X-Men reboot casting rumors. Adam Driver is reportedly being eyed for Magneto. Driver previously starred in the Star Wars sequel trilogy.

headline: It Sounds Like Mike Flanagan Is Having a Tough Time Getting the Green Light on His Long-Awaited Dark Tower TV Series
summary: Mike Flanagan provides an update on his Dark Tower TV series. The project faces significant hurdles for a green light. Its realization still seems far off.

headline: PPE failures left NHS staff poorly protected and wasted £10bn, Covid inquiry finds
summary: Covid inquiry reveals NHS PPE failures. Staff were poorly protected from dangerous infections. Failures led to a wasted £10bn.

headline: Scott Mills was highest-paid BBC star before sacking
summary: Scott Mills was the BBC's highest-paid star. He earned approximately £745,000 in the last financial year. This was before his recent departure from Radio 2 breakfast.

headline: Wildfires burn in parts of UK as fire chiefs warn of extreme pressure
summary: Wildfires are burning across parts of the UK. Fire chiefs warn of extreme pressure on services. Major incidents declared in North Wales and Derbyshire.

headline: MPs expected to approve long-delayed 'Hillsborough Law'
summary: MPs are set to approve the 'Hillsborough Law'. The long-delayed legislation returns to the Commons. Approval comes during Sir Keir Starmer's final days as PM.
